channel.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our Technical SEO Expert Christian Oliveira
channel.description:
One of the main concerns when building a headless WordPress site with React is SEO and how to do it right.
From now on, **Christian Oliveira** (@christianoliveira) is joining the Frontity community and will be our **Technical SEO Expert** to help answer all your questions about technical SEO. :slight_smile:
Welcome and thanks for joining us, Christian! 🙌

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our Technical SEO Expert Christian Oliveira
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Welcome Chris! So happy to have you here

Read full topic
item.source: [General Announcement] Introducing our Technical SEO Expert Christian Oliveira

item.title: [General Announcement] Introducing our Technical SEO Expert Christian Oliveira
item.dc:creator: christianoliveira
item.description:
Thanks!

Happy to be part of the community, looking forward to answer your SEO questions and to see Frontity growing

Read full topic

One of the main concerns when building a headless WordPress site with React is SEO and how to do it right.

From now on, Christian Oliveira (@christianoliveira) is joining the Frontity community and will be our Technical SEO Expert to help answer all your questions about technical SEO.
